# The Courier

## Description

The merchant no longer runs out of cards, relics, or potions and his prices are reduced by 20%.

## Strategy Notes

- Raises the value of upcoming shops, especially with high gold; prioritize shop paths when they do not give up key rest-site access or force unsafe elites.
